A

applyPunishment(Punishment) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.Player
Applies the effects of a punishment by reducing the player's score.

B

BarrierCell - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.cells
concrete cell; a barrier tile that blocks movement
BarrierCell(Position) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.cells.BarrierCell
creates a barrier cell at the given position
board - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.core.GameCharacter
Board the character exists and moves on.
Board - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.board
represents the dungeon board as a 2D grid of Cell more specifically: store the dungeon as a full Cell[][] grid providing getCell(x,y) and setCell(x, y, cell)
Board(Cell[][]) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.board.Board
creates a new board with the given grid
BoardLoader - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.board
Loads a Board from a simple ASCII map file
BoardLoader.Result - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.board
Container for the loaded Board plus marker/spawn positions.
BONUS_COLLECTED - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.PopupReason
 
BonusReward - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward
A reward that provides a temp bonus eefect for a limited duration.
BonusReward(int, int) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.BonusReward
point value and add duration.
BonusRewardSpawn - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward
Tracks a temporary bonus reward currently spawned on the board.
BonusRewardSpawn(Position, int) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.BonusRewardSpawn
Creates a tracker for a spawned bonus reward.
buildRenderItemsForTest() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.GamePanel
Rebuilds the draw queue for the current state and returns the render items.

canMoveto(Cell) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.core.GameCharacter
Returns whether this character can move onto the given cell.
canMoveto(Cell) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.enemies.Enemy
Returns whether this enemy can move onto the given cell.
canMoveto(Cell) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.Player
Returns whether the player can move onto the given cell.
Cell - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.cells
represents one tile on the board grid
Cell(Position) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.cells.Cell
Creates a cell at the given grid position
checkLoss() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.Game
Checks whether the player has lost the game.
checkWin() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.Game
Checks whether player has met win condition
clear() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.DrawQueue
Removes all queued render items (typically called at the start of each frame).
clearReward() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.RewardCell
Removes the reward from this cell.
collectReward(Reward) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.Player
Applies the effects of a collected reward.

D

Direction - Enum Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.core
Small direction enum with NORTH, EAST, SOUTH and WEST
DrawQueue - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui
Manages a queue of RenderItems to be drawn in layer order.
DrawQueue() - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.DrawQueue
Creates an empty draw queue and loads required sprite atlases from resources.

G

Game - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7
Core controller for the game.
Game(Board, Player, List<Enemy>, int, int, List<Position>, List<Position>) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.Game
Constructs a new game controller with the given board, player, enemies, and initial reward/trap metadata
Game(Board, Player, List<Enemy>, int, int, List<Position>, List<Position>, LongSupplier) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.Game
Constructs a new game controller with the given board, player, enemies, initial reward/trap metadata, and time source.

GameCharacter - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.core
Abstract base class for movable characters in the game.
GameCharacter(Board) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.core.GameCharacter
Creates a game character associated with the given board.
GamePanel - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui
Swing panel responsible for rendering the game.

Creates a panel that renders the given game and board.

GameWindow opens the window, and starts the panel within it

getRenderYForTest() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.GamePanel

getValue() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.Reward

getViewEndXForTest() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.GamePanel
Returns the current viewport right bound in board coordinates (exclusive).
getViewEndYForTest() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.GamePanel
Returns the current viewport bottom bound in board coordinates (exclusive).
getViewStartXForTest() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.GamePanel
Returns the current viewport left bound in board coordinates (inclusive).
getViewStartYForTest() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.GamePanel
Returns the current viewport top bound in board coordinates (inclusive).

getX() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.RenderItem
 
getXOffsetForTest() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.GamePanel

getY() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.core.Position
 
getY() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.RenderItem
 
getYOffsetForTest() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.GamePanel

barrier are not walkable

Whther a character can move into this cell

a FloorCell is walkable

O

Ogre - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.enemies
Enemy that patrols along a predefined route or along a straight line determined from a starting position and direction.
Ogre(Board, Position...) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.enemies.Ogre
Creates an ogre that follows the given patrol route.
Ogre(Board, Position, Direction) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.enemies.Ogre
Creates an ogre that patrols back and forth in a straight line.
OGRE_HIT - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.PopupReason
 
onCollect() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.BonusReward
 
onCollect() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.RegularReward
Handles collection of this reward.
onCollect() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.Reward
Defines what happens when the player collects this reward.
onTrigger() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.Punishment
Defines what happens when the player triggers this punishment.
onTrigger() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.TrapPunishment
Handles activation of this trap punishment.

paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.GamePanel
Paints the panel by rebuilding the draw queue and rendering all items.

penaltyValue - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.Punishment
Number of points removed when this punishment is applied.
Player - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward
Represents the player character in the game.

Creates a player at the given starting position on the board.

PopupReason - Enum Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7
Represents the reason a popup is currently being shown.
position - Variable in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.core.GameCharacter
Current board position of the character.
Position - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.core
immutable position in the board grid (cell coordinates) x = coloumn index (0 based, increases to the right) y = row index (0 based, increased downards)
Position(int, int) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.core.Position
creates a new grid position
Punishment - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward
Base class for all punishment types in the game.

Creates a punishment with the given penalty value.

A cell that contains a punishment.
PunishmentCell(Position, Punishment) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.PunishmentCell

RECTANGLE - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.RenderKind

A standard reward that simply gives the player points.

renderAll(Graphics) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.DrawQueue
Renders all queued items to the given graphics context.
RenderItem - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui
A lightweight, immutable render command to be consumed by DrawQueue.
RenderKind - Enum Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui
The type of drawable represented by a RenderItem.
resetGameState() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.Game
Restores the game to its initial pre-play state
resetState() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.enemies.Ogre
Restores the ogre's initial position, patrol direction, and route index.
resetState(Position) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.Player
Resets the player's state to a fresh starting state.

sprite(int, int, int, int, int, SheetId, int, int, int, int) - Static method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.RenderItem

SPRITE - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.RenderKind
Sprite rendered from a source rectangle on a sprite sheet onto a destination rectangle.
start(Game, Board) - Static method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.GameWindow
Opens the game window and starts the UI event loop for the given game.
START - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ScreenState
 
startGame() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.Game
Starts or restarts active gameplay from the current reset state

T

text(int, int, int, Color, String, Font) - Static method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.RenderItem

TEXT - Enum constant in enum class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.RenderKind
Text rendered at (x, y) using the item's color, font, and string content.
tick() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.BonusReward
Decreases the duration and when it hits 0 the effect will go away.
tick() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.BonusRewardSpawn
Decreases the remaining lifetime by one tick, if it is still positive.
tickBonus() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.Player
Updates the active bonus effect each game tick.
togglePause() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.Game
Toggles between paused and playing states
toString() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.core.Position
 
TrapPunishment - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward
A basic trap punishment that only removes points.
TrapPunishment(int) - Constructor for class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.reward.TrapPunishment

U

updateMovement(Position, Set<Position>) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.enemies.Enemy
updateMovement() updates the position of the enemy by a single tick.
updateMovement(Position, Set<Position>) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.enemies.Goblin
Moves the goblin 1 tile towards the player
updateMovement(Position, Set<Position>) - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.enemies.Ogre
Updates the ogre's movement by attempting to advance along its patrol route.
updateTick() - Method in class ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.Game
Advances the game by one simulation tick.

WallCell - Class in ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.cells
concrete cell; a solid wall tile that blocks movement
